generic.description: Default import profile for external datasets. It adds no dataset-specific waivers and relies on schema, QA, curation, cleanup, dry-run, and verification gates.

bafu.description: BAFU / FOEN import profile for BAFU 2025 ecoSpold1 converted TIDAS rows, using root TIDAS library-level entity indexing plus the converted process-bundles index for process-level closure, queue-lock parallelism, reference-only canonical unitgroup/flowproperty reuse, true-source-or-BAFU-database source attribution, one canonical FOEN/BAFU contact, deterministic source-only-output exchange proof when source rows support it, and task-policy-gated batch commit.

waiver_reasons.process_material_balance_deviation: BAFU profile treats process_material_balance_deviation as a source-data QA observation, not a remote-write blocker. Other schema, placeholder, reference, unit, required-field, and trace blockers remain blocking.

full_context_ai_completion.proof: dataset-identity-decision-task-build plus dataset-identity-decisions-apply with authoring_package_sha256 and closes_action_items evidence for identity-preflight decisions, dataset-classification-decisions-apply with matching classification decision task/context_bundle_sha256 for classification queues, dataset-location-decisions-apply with matching location decision task/context_bundle_sha256 for location queues, dataset-curation-cleanup deterministic proof for source-only-output exchange completeness when an explicit source rows file proves the source and final exchange signatures, or dataset-authoring-patch-collect plus dataset-patch-apply with authoring_package_sha256 and closes_action_items evidence for other field patches

uslci.description: USLCI import profile skeleton. It intentionally adds no dataset-specific code path or approved waivers until a pilot run proves them.

full_context_ai_completion.proof: No USLCI-specific full-context AI proof override is approved yet; use generic curation and queue verification gates.
